rules.label: 8.A.
rules.html: <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">Player</dfn> substitutions can be completed only:
rules.text: Player substitutions can be completed only:

children.label: 8.A.1.
children.html: after a goal and before the substituting team has signaled readiness; or
children.text: after a goal and before the substituting team has signaled readiness; or

children.label: 8.A.2.
children.html: to replace injured players, replace players with illegal equipment (7.D.3), to resolve an incorrect personnel violation (9.C.1), or to replace a player removed due to misconduct (2.C.2, C3.B.6). In this case, the opposing team may substitute a like number of, or fewer, players.
children.text: to replace injured players, replace players with illegal equipment (7.D.3), to resolve an incorrect personnel violation (9.C.1), or to replace a player removed due to misconduct (2.C.2, C3.B.6). In this case, the opposing team may substitute a like number of, or fewer, players.

rules.label: 8.B.
rules.html: Substitutions are not permitted following a re-pull call, unless in accordance with 8.A.2.
rules.text: Substitutions are not permitted following a re-pull call, unless in accordance with 8.A.2.
